name: com.no-slopes.handy-fsm
description: Deprecated HandyFSM package kept as a project module and legacy reference for Unity finite state machines.

samples.description: Optional Character Controller Pro integration sample for Handy FSM.

scripts.pre-release: npx auto-changelog -p && mv -f CHANGELOG.md ../../docfx_project/documentation/CHANGELOG.md && docfx ../../docfx_project/docfx.json && echo Go create Unity .meta and the .unitypackage before releasing
